art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 public days underway (March 27-29). Strong sales reported for blue-chip artists and notable success for Korean galleries.
top_stories: Art Basel HK 2026 public days opening reports strong sales, solid blue-chip demand.
Korean artists (Lee Bul, Kim Yun-shin, others) seeing robust interest at galleries like Lehmann Maupin and Kukje.
New platforms 'Echoes' and 'Zero 10' digital initiative debuting successfully.
Collaboration with HK authorities aims for long-term presence through 2030.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,438.87 (-0.40%) after rebounding from earlier 4% intraday low.
key_factors: TurboQuant AI tech impact continues to pressure semiconductor stocks.
Strong retail/institutional support saved KOSPI from deeper sell-off.
Foreign investors were net sellers, offloading nearly 3.9T KRW.
Iran war geopolitical concerns remain elevated.
